TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_ulic-_u_ading, title = ulic-_u_ading, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/ulic-_u_ading} }

S.FORM: == satangahan nu ulic == u ading ngatu ngatu-1 u ading maydih tu cilal, u ading maydih tu bulad, u ading malecad tu mitizinaay, sawni inuayawan, sawni inudikudan milimek. patelatela' kaku, patelatela' cinida; mutukud kaku mutukud cinida. ngatu-2 kalahukan inayi' tu, malecad tu miliyasay i takuwan, mihica kaku, mahida tu. ading, anu i cuwacuwa, miladay i takuwan. hanca nayi' ku udip nu ading, nika idaw a naku kyu misamelit. painging i cilal misangelu' malaluk a tademaw, makadih tu ading nida; mikilidungay a tademaw, caypakadih tu ading nida. ngatu-3 "nayi' pasengalan minanam" a tademaw malecad tu ading malalaba', caay pakaletep kisu, nika mikalul i tapingan isu, anu misaicelang kisu cayka utang, a malacacay kita atu ading, matalul, suayaw, macakat, lipahak, caysengal, ngutad, ading malecad tu nisa adiding tu ita, u adding ita amana haw, kawnika cayayen ita kalaluk kyu cayculal ku tagah. ngatu-4 u ading mucebang tu nikabalakiyan ita, nanu wawa wakawak sahen ku ading, katuluh ini kataniktek nu udip, katukuh ini kabalaki makunul ku ading, malawit cay tu tiku. simacecay amin ku tademaw tu ading, laetus kauah caykaw papili'an, caypiliyas. paenengenta ku kasenengan a aging, tadimecmec han kuni cakatan ama udip, ayda yanisaicelangan isu paayaw tu ading, anu duma tu a demiad caykanca paini tisuwan tu telatela'. ngatu-5 anu idaway tu ku takelal idaway tu ku adingÔĻź sisa u tademaw kay tini tu haw i takelalay, pasayda i takelal, milikeluh u sakasaan tu takelalÔĻź manakaytid a tida tu i dutayÔĻź milamel i dutay. anu maselu' i dutay hawÔĻź pisaicelangi tu tayda i takelalayÔĻź anu i teban nu dadan madaceb nu yadahay a badesÔĻź amana pisayah kubalucu`ÔĻź u sakasaan napacitan haw idaw tu ku sananalÔĻź anu maledu tu ku balucu`, sahemhemÔĻź sadungdung a nisimsim tu tatudu`en lalid misaicelangÔĻź mutenes kya haw kanca maliya i sukuduutay.
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan nu ur~…ĺi ¶ == u adiŇč Ňčatu Ňčatu-* u adiŇč majdińß tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, u adiŇč majdińß tu bur~…ĺad, u adiŇč mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu mitizinaaj, sawni inuajawan, sawni inudikudan mir~…ĺim…ôk. pat…ôr~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° kaku, pat…ôr~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶inida; mutukud kaku mutukud ¶inida. Ňčatu-* kar~…ĺańßukan inaji Ē~ ° tu, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu mir~…ĺijasaj i takuwan, mińßi ¶a kaku, mańßida tu. adiŇč, anu i ¶uwa ¶uwa, mir~…ĺadaj i takuwan. ńßan ¶a naji Ē~ ° ku udip nu adiŇč, nika idaw a naku kju misam…ôr~…ĺit. paiŇčiŇč i ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ misaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺar~…ĺuk a tad…ômaw, makadińß tu adiŇč nida; mikir~…ĺiduŇčaj a tad…ômaw, ¶ajpakadińß tu adiŇč nida. Ňčatu-* "naji Ē~ ° pas…ôŇčar~…ĺan minanam" a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu adiŇč mar~…ĺar~…ĺaba Ē~ °, ¶aaj pakar~…ĺ…ôt…ôp kisu, nika mikar~…ĺur~…ĺ i tapiŇčan isu, anu misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč kisu ¶ajka utaŇč, a mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj kita atu adiŇč, matar~…ĺur~…ĺ, suajaw, ma ¶akat, r~…ĺipańßak, ¶ajs…ôŇčar~…ĺ, Ňčutad, adiŇč mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nisa adidiŇč tu ita, u addiŇč ita amana ńßaw, kawnika ¶ajaj…ôn ita kar~…ĺar~…ĺuk kju ¶aj ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ ku tagańß. Ňčatu-* u adiŇč mu ¶…ôbaŇč tu nikabar~…ĺakijan ita, nanu wawa wakawak sańß…ôn ku adiŇč, katur~…ĺuńß ini katanikt…ôk nu udip, katukuńß ini kabar~…ĺaki makunur~…ĺ ku adiŇč, mar~…ĺawit ¶aj tu tiku. sima ¶…ô ¶aj amin ku tad…ômaw tu adiŇč, r~…ĺa…ôtus kauańß ¶ajkaw papir~…ĺi Ē~ °an, ¶ajpir~…ĺijas. pa…ôn…ôŇč…ônta ku kas…ôn…ôŇčan a agiŇč, tadim…ô ¶m…ô ¶ ńßan kuni ¶akatan ama udip, ajda janisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan isu paajaw tu adiŇč, anu duma tu a d…ômiad ¶ajkan ¶a paini tisuwan tu t…ôr~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °. Ňčatu-* anu idawaj tu ku tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ idawaj tu ku adiŇč* sisa u tad…ômaw kaj tini tu ńßaw i tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, pasajda i tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ, mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß u sakasaan tu tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ* manakajtid a tida tu i dutaj* mir~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ i dutaj. anu mas…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° i dutaj ńßaw* pisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇči tu tajda i tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj* anu i t…ôban nu dadan mada ¶…ôb nu jadańßaj a bad…ôs* amana pisajańß kubar~…ĺu ¶u`* u sakasaan napa ¶itan ńßaw idaw tu ku sananar~…ĺ* anu mar~…ĺ…ôdu tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u`, sańß…ômńß…ôm* saduŇčduŇč a nisimsim tu tatudu`…ôn r~…ĺar~…ĺid misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč* mut…ôn…ôs kja ńßaw kan ¶a mar~…ĺija i sukuduutaj.
S.FORM: == satangahan nu ulic == u ading ngatu ngatu-1 u ading maydih tu cilal, u ading maydih tu bulad, u ading malecad tu mitizinaay, sawni inuayawan, sawni inudikudan milimek. patelatela' kaku, patelatela' cinida; mutukud kaku mutukud cinida. ngatu-2 kalahukan inayi' tu, malecad tu miliyasay i takuwan, mihica kaku, mahida tu. ading, anu i cuwacuwa, miladay i takuwan. hanca nayi' ku udip nu ading, nika idaw a naku kyu misamelit. painging i cilal misangelu' malaluk a tademaw, makadih tu ading nida; mikilidungay a tademaw, caypakadih tu ading nida. ngatu-3 "nayi' pasengalan minanam" a tademaw malecad tu ading malalaba', caay pakaletep kisu, nika mikalul i tapingan isu, anu misaicelang kisu cayka utang, a malacacay kita atu ading, matalul, suayaw, macakat, lipahak, caysengal, ngutad, ading malecad tu nisa adiding tu ita, u adding ita amana haw, kawnika cayayen ita kalaluk kyu cayculal ku tagah. ngatu-4 u ading mucebang tu nikabalakiyan ita, nanu wawa wakawak sahen ku ading, katuluh ini kataniktek nu udip, katukuh ini kabalaki makunul ku ading, malawit cay tu tiku. simacecay amin ku tademaw tu ading, laetus kauah caykaw papili'an, caypiliyas. paenengenta ku kasenengan a aging, tadimecmec han kuni cakatan ama udip, ayda yanisaicelangan isu paayaw tu ading, anu duma tu a demiad caykanca paini tisuwan tu telatela'. ngatu-5 anu idaway tu ku takelal idaway tu ku adingÔĻź sisa u tademaw kay tini tu haw i takelalay, pasayda i takelal, milikeluh u sakasaan tu takelalÔĻź manakaytid a tida tu i dutayÔĻź milamel i dutay. anu maselu' i dutay hawÔĻź pisaicelangi tu tayda i takelalayÔĻź anu i teban nu dadan madaceb nu yadahay a badesÔĻź amana pisayah kubalucu`ÔĻź u sakasaan napacitan haw idaw tu ku sananalÔĻź anu maledu tu ku balucu`, sahemhemÔĻź sadungdung a nisimsim tu tatudu`en lalid misaicelangÔĻź mutenes kya haw kanca maliya i sukuduutay.
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan nu ur~…ĺi ¶ == u adiŇč Ňčatu Ňčatu-* u adiŇč majdińß tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, u adiŇč majdińß tu bur~…ĺad, u adiŇč mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu mitizinaaj, sawni inuajawan, sawni inudikudan mir~…ĺim…ôk. pat…ôr~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° kaku, pat…ôr~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶inida; mutukud kaku mutukud ¶inida. Ňčatu-* kar~…ĺańßukan inaji Ē~ ° tu, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu mir~…ĺijasaj i takuwan, mińßi ¶a kaku, mańßida tu. adiŇč, anu i ¶uwa ¶uwa, mir~…ĺadaj i takuwan. ńßan ¶a naji Ē~ ° ku udip nu adiŇč, nika idaw a naku kju misam…ôr~…ĺit. paiŇčiŇč i ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ misaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺar~…ĺuk a tad…ômaw, makadińß tu adiŇč nida; mikir~…ĺiduŇčaj a tad…ômaw, ¶ajpakadińß tu adiŇč nida. Ňčatu-* "naji Ē~ ° pas…ôŇčar~…ĺan minanam" a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu adiŇč mar~…ĺar~…ĺaba Ē~ °, ¶aaj pakar~…ĺ…ôt…ôp kisu, nika mikar~…ĺur~…ĺ i tapiŇčan isu, anu misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč kisu ¶ajka utaŇč, a mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj kita atu adiŇč, matar~…ĺur~…ĺ, suajaw, ma ¶akat, r~…ĺipańßak, ¶ajs…ôŇčar~…ĺ, Ňčutad, adiŇč mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nisa adidiŇč tu ita, u addiŇč ita amana ńßaw, kawnika ¶ajaj…ôn ita kar~…ĺar~…ĺuk kju ¶aj ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ ku tagańß. Ňčatu-* u adiŇč mu ¶…ôbaŇč tu nikabar~…ĺakijan ita, nanu wawa wakawak sańß…ôn ku adiŇč, katur~…ĺuńß ini katanikt…ôk nu udip, katukuńß ini kabar~…ĺaki makunur~…ĺ ku adiŇč, mar~…ĺawit ¶aj tu tiku. sima ¶…ô ¶aj amin ku tad…ômaw tu adiŇč, r~…ĺa…ôtus kauańß ¶ajkaw papir~…ĺi Ē~ °an, ¶ajpir~…ĺijas. pa…ôn…ôŇč…ônta ku kas…ôn…ôŇčan a agiŇč, tadim…ô ¶m…ô ¶ ńßan kuni ¶akatan ama udip, ajda janisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčan isu paajaw tu adiŇč, anu duma tu a d…ômiad ¶ajkan ¶a paini tisuwan tu t…ôr~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °. Ňčatu-* anu idawaj tu ku tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ idawaj tu ku adiŇč* sisa u tad…ômaw kaj tini tu ńßaw i tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, pasajda i tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ, mir~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß u sakasaan tu tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ* manakajtid a tida tu i dutaj* mir~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ i dutaj. anu mas…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° i dutaj ńßaw* pisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇči tu tajda i tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj* anu i t…ôban nu dadan mada ¶…ôb nu jadańßaj a bad…ôs* amana pisajańß kubar~…ĺu ¶u`* u sakasaan napa ¶itan ńßaw idaw tu ku sananar~…ĺ* anu mar~…ĺ…ôdu tu ku bar~…ĺu ¶u`, sańß…ômńß…ôm* saduŇčduŇč a nisimsim tu tatudu`…ôn r~…ĺar~…ĺid misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč* mut…ôn…ôs kja ńßaw kan ¶a mar~…ĺija i sukuduutaj.
